---
title: "Activity 2"
auhtor: "Varun Gullanki, Amal Parekh"
format: pdf
editor: visual
---

## Nittany Lion Insurance Dashboard

## Code Appendix

```{r}
library(tidyverse)

ins <- read_csv("insurance_data_S26.csv")

glimpse(ins)
summary(ins)

ggplot(ins, aes(charges)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 40)
ggplot(ins, aes(log(charges))) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 40)

ins <- ins %>%
  mutate(
    sex = factor(sex),
    smoker = factor(smoker),
    region = factor(region),
    month = factor(month)
  )

ggplot(ins, aes(smoker, charges)) +
  geom_boxplot()

m1 <- lm(log(charges) ~ age + sex + bmi + children + smoker + region + month + priorclaims,
         data = ins)

summary(m1)

ggplot(ins, aes(smoker, log(charges))) +
  geom_boxplot()

m2 <- lm(log(charges) ~ age + sex + bmi + children + smoker +
           region + month + priorclaims +
           smoker:bmi,
         data = ins)

summary(m2)

par(mfrow = c(2,2))
plot(m2)
par(mfrow = c(1,1))
```
